title: Resolution authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez in behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to donate two (2) units of Hyundai Van one each to Barangay Mayondon and Barangay San Antonio purchased by the Municipal Government amounting to Two Million One Hundred Seventy One Thousand Nine Hundred Forty Pesos and 00/100 (P 2, 171,940.00).
